name: @ctok/raycast
title: ctok — Claude Token Estimator
description: Estimate Claude token usage, cost, and quota impact. Refine prompts and scan projects without leaving your keyboard.
author: ctok-cli

commands.name: check
commands.title: Check Token Usage
commands.description: Estimate tokens, cost, and get a model recommendation for a Claude prompt.

commands.name: refine
commands.title: Refine Prompt
commands.description: Run the 7-pass prompt refiner to trim tokens and improve clarity.

commands.name: clipboard-check
commands.title: Check Clipboard as Prompt
commands.description: Estimate token usage for the current clipboard contents.

commands.name: scan
commands.title: Scan Project Directory
commands.description: Analyse a project directory and show its token footprint.

preferences.name: plan
preferences.title: Claude Plan
preferences.description: Your Claude subscription plan, used for quota calculations.

preferences.name: model
preferences.title: Model Override
preferences.description: Override model for cost estimates (e.g. haiku-4-5). Leave empty to use the recommended model.

preferences.name: taskType
preferences.title: Default Task Type
preferences.description: Default task type hint used when estimating tokens.
